Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Silverfang Carp]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Silverfang Carp are fish that are not meant to be eaten by humans and were raised like cattle to feed larger specimens of Ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Silverfang Carp meat promotes physical vitality and muscle growth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — The Silverfang Carp was killed by Lindon's Remnant fist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon and Orthos finished the Silverfang Carp almost a week before.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Silverfang Carp are approaching the habitat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Silverfang Carp are fish that gather in schools.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 11''' — Silverfang Carp are creatures that can be eaten for meat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — The meat of the Silverfang Carp nourished Lindon's body.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — Silverfang Carp meat is highly potent.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
